◆ Demo checkout

This is an integration-ready checkout. Contact & shipping validation works client-side; the payment step is a labeled hand-off point for Stripe Checkout or Shopify — no card data is collected here. See PLACE-ORDER in the page source.

1 · Contact

2 · Shipping

3 · Payment

🔒 Secure payment

Payment is handled by a PCI-compliant processor. Connect Stripe or Shopify to enable live card, Apple Pay and Google Pay checkout.

By ordering you agree to the drop terms. All sales on limited items are final.
